name: Hubei Kailong Chemical Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Hubei Kailong Chemical Group Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of explosive materials in China. The company offers civil explosive; nano-calcium carbonate; nitro compound fertilizers; ammonium nitrate; and paper plastic packaging products. It also engages in the engineering blasting business. Hubei Kailong Chemical Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1967 and is based in Jingmen, China.
